## Module or Section

<!-- Which module, notebook, or section should this content be added to or near?
     e.g. Module 4 – Group-Level Analysis, Introduction -->

## Description of Requested Content

A clear and concise description of the content, exercise, or feature you would like to see added.

## Learning Objectives

What should a learner be able to do or understand after engaging with this content?

- [ ] Objective 1
- [ ] Objective 2

## Why This Would Be Valuable

Explain why adding this content would benefit learners of the tutorial. Include any relevant background or use cases.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, links to papers or tools, or examples from other resources that illustrate what you have in mind.
